segments.caption: Your repo → an owned, proven, running cluster
segments.narration: Your infrastructure should be something you own — running in your own cloud, and proven at every step. Alethia takes your repository to a running, configured Kubernetes cluster. Keyless. And it proves what it did.

segments.caption: Every service and dependency, on one canvas
segments.narration: Every service and every dependency lives on one canvas you can see and configure — network, cluster, database, cache, DNS, storage — all compiled to OpenTofu. No YAML, no hidden state.

segments.caption: Shape it. Live cost as you design.
segments.narration: Shape each resource directly — the cluster, its nodes, its version — with a live cost estimate that updates as you design. Six hundred and twelve dollars a month, before you ever apply.

segments.caption: Multi-cloud. Keyless. Zero stored credentials.
segments.narration: Connect AWS, Google Cloud, or Hetzner through short-lived federated identity. Alethia holds zero static keys. Your projects run across clouds, in accounts you own.

segments.caption: Elench — the agent that understands your infrastructure
segments.narration: And there's Elench — the agent that understands your infrastructure. Ask it anything: are my connectors healthy, what's my spend, is anything drifting. Or have it propose an operation. But it never provisions on its own.

segments.caption: The LLM proposes. The gate disposes.
segments.narration: Before anything runs, a deterministic gate verifies the plan — keyless, least-privilege, fail-closed. Every apply reconciles through GitOps, and carries a signed, ed25519 evidence receipt. Prove it once. Then keep proving it.

segments.caption: Day-two is the product
segments.narration: This is day-two operations — plan, apply, audit, drift detection — every action a streamed, audited job.

segments.caption: A self-healing runner fleet
segments.narration: A self-healing fleet of runners executes it all — sized to demand, healing and rolling itself to new versions with zero downtime.

segments.caption: Own it. Keyless. Proven.
segments.narration: Alethia is open source — self-host the whole control plane in your own cloud. Verified, evidence-backed, keyless delivery, that you own.

segments.caption: Start today · alethialabs.io
segments.narration: Create an account, or book a demo, at alethia labs dot I O.
